generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; person-platform GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: This is not a normal brand SKU report. It maps product methodology to commercialization paths. Unsupported founder cash, exact margins, live valuations, private-company losses, or platform fee rates are kept in research_gaps.

founder_background: Dong Mingzhu: Not the founder of Gree; she is the professional-manager symbol of sales discipline and channel governance.
Zhu Jianghong: Important early Gree leader and Dong’s predecessor; needed to avoid rewriting Gree history as a one-person founding story.
brand_timeline: 1990: salary about RMB 200/month - Base report records Dong’s early monthly salary as a salesperson; this is personal career context, not company capital.
1990: cash_collection RMB 420K - Base report records her famous first-year debt collection case as a sales-governance signal.
1992: regional_sales RMB 16M - Base report records Anhui sales of about RMB 16M; useful as sales-ability evidence, not audited segment revenue.
2023: company_profit $4.1B profit - Forbes-cited public profile says Gree fiscal 2023 profit reached about $4.1B.

founder_profiles.name: Dong Mingzhu
founder_profiles.background_summary: Not the founder of Gree; she is the professional-manager symbol of sales discipline and channel governance.

founder_profiles.name: Zhu Jianghong
founder_profiles.background_summary: Important early Gree leader and Dong’s predecessor; needed to avoid rewriting Gree history as a one-person founding story.

capital_history.description: Base report records Dong’s early monthly salary as a salesperson; this is personal career context, not company capital.
Base report records her famous first-year debt collection case as a sales-governance signal.
Base report records Anhui sales of about RMB 16M; useful as sales-ability evidence, not audited segment revenue.
Forbes-cited public profile says Gree fiscal 2023 profit reached about $4.1B.

research_gaps: Do not treat Dong as Gree founder.
Exact live-commerce GMV, dealer rebate cash flow, and phone/Yinlong losses need primary sources before writing as facts.
Gree SKU prices should be captured by region and installation package.

gtm_extension.summary: Dong Mingzhu should be read as a professional-manager GTM case, not a founder-brand case. Her product methodology is channel discipline, price authority, service credibility, and manufacturing control around air conditioners. The commercialization path was not a charismatic DTC startup story: it was distributor governance, seasonal rebate design, cash collection, national retail coverage, and later live commerce. The limit is also clear: the same strong-person sales system struggled in smartphones, EV diversification, and succession.
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: Dong Mingzhu should be read as a professional-manager GTM case, not a founder-brand case.
channel_path: Front-line debt collection and sales credibility
Gree air-conditioner quality and service promise
Chairwoman personal IP and live commerce
Diversification attempts reveal the boundary of the method

channels.product_method: The person creates a repeatable product principle, not just a single product launch.
channels.platform: The strongest outputs become platforms, ecosystems, or distribution standards.
channels.commercialization: Monetization appears through hardware margin, services, commissions, ads, subscriptions, contracts, or enterprise fees.
channels.community: Developers, merchants, fans, users, channels, or government customers become the adoption network.
channels.governance: Platform risk comes from rules, support, safety, regulation, succession, and founder overreach.
channels.dealer_network: Gree historically depended on dealer discipline and seasonal channel financing.
channels.live_commerce: Dong personal IP later became a direct-sales and public-trust channel.

business_model.pricing_logic: Maintain premium service and dealer discipline instead of pure low-price competition.
business_model.channel_economics: The system monetizes through channel control and service trust, but risks channel rigidity and overdependence on one category.

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: For person/platform reports, choose no more than 3 product-methodology platforms, not ordinary SKUs.

top_products.name: Gree air-conditioner channel system
top_products.why_selected: This is Dong Mingzhu’s real GTM product: a disciplined channel system around a high-ticket durable appliance.
top_products.origin_story: Dong entered Gree as a salesperson, built credibility through debt collection and regional sales, then scaled sales governance.
top_products.pre_market: The pre-market issue was not user demand for cooling; it was channel cash discipline, inventory timing, and price control.
top_products.innovation: Seasonal rebate logic, strict dealer rules, and service promise turned a commodity appliance into a controlled distribution system.
top_products.breakout: Gree became one of China’s air-conditioner leaders and Dong became the face of sales discipline.
top_products.customer_impact: Consumers see a durable appliance with installation and service confidence, not just a compressor price.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: The method influenced how Chinese appliance makers think about dealer power and retail price stability.

pricing_model.product_price: Gree is not a single SKU: wall-mounted, cabinet, central and commercial AC prices vary by region, capacity, installation and warranty.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No core consumer software subscription; smart-home app features are support layer, not the main revenue model.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: installation, copper pipe length, outdoor-unit bracket, cleaning, warranty and repair are part of total cost.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Midea, Haier, Hisense and AUX compete by capacity, energy efficiency, installation package and warranty; compare category by category, not brand average.

what_to_learn: Study the product principle first, then the commercialization path.
Separate the person from the company balance sheet and from platform economics.
For platforms, price often appears as commission, ad auction, subscription, service fee, or switching cost rather than SKU price.
do_not_copy_blindly: Do not force a normal brand template onto a person or platform report.
Do not invent founder cash, margin, loss, valuation, or fee rates when sources are weak.

top_products.name: Dong Mingzhu personal IP / live commerce
top_products.why_selected: Her public persona became a trust and traffic channel for Gree.
top_products.origin_story: After decades as a sales leader, Dong’s identity became inseparable from Gree quality and discipline.
top_products.pre_market: Before live commerce, Gree relied more on dealer networks; later direct sales let Dong bypass some channel friction.
top_products.innovation: Founder-like executive livestreaming turns authority into conversion for durable goods.
top_products.breakout: It can move inventory and reinforce trust, but it also makes the organization too dependent on one face.
top_products.customer_impact: Consumers may trust the person more than the product line, which helps conversion but hurts succession.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It shows how Chinese industrial brands can use executive IP without being founder-led startups.

pricing_model.product_price: Livestream product prices vary by event and SKU; write live offer price only when the event page is preserved.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No mandatory subscription; monetization is hardware sales and service attach.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: delivery, installation and after-sales service remain the real conversion promise.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Midea and Haier use broader brand/retail systems rather than one-person IP; Xiaomi/Lei Jun uses founder IP for launches, but with a younger ecosystem narrative.

what_to_learn: Study the product principle first, then the commercialization path.
Separate the person from the company balance sheet and from platform economics.
For platforms, price often appears as commission, ad auction, subscription, service fee, or switching cost rather than SKU price.
do_not_copy_blindly: Do not force a normal brand template onto a person or platform report.
Do not invent founder cash, margin, loss, valuation, or fee rates when sources are weak.

sources.title: South China Morning Post Dong Mingzhu profile

top_products.name: Diversification boundary: phone / Yinlong / new energy
top_products.why_selected: The failed extensions explain where Dong’s method stops working.
top_products.origin_story: Gree’s air-conditioner success tempted expansion into phones and new energy vehicles.
top_products.pre_market: The market did not need a Gree phone just because it trusted Gree air conditioners.
top_products.innovation: The same command-and-control confidence produced fast decisions but weak product-market fit.
top_products.breakout: Phone and Yinlong stories became cautionary examples in the base report.
top_products.customer_impact: Users punish irrelevant diversification because durable-appliance trust does not automatically transfer to phones or EVs.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: The lesson is that channel power cannot replace category-native product truth.

pricing_model.product_price: Gree phone and Yinlong-related prices/valuation should not be quoted without preserved sources; report keeps them as failure-boundary cases.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No subscription/software fee is the core issue; the issue is category fit and capital allocation.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: EV and phone service networks require different service economics from air conditioners.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Xiaomi/Apple in phones and BYD/Tesla in EVs have platform-native advantages that Gree did not possess.

what_to_learn: Study the product principle first, then the commercialization path.
Separate the person from the company balance sheet and from platform economics.
For platforms, price often appears as commission, ad auction, subscription, service fee, or switching cost rather than SKU price.
do_not_copy_blindly: Do not force a normal brand template onto a person or platform report.
Do not invent founder cash, margin, loss, valuation, or fee rates when sources are weak.

learning_summary: The learnable part is channel governance, not personality worship.
A sales method can create a platform-like distribution advantage, but it may not transfer to unrelated categories.
Professional-manager reports must separate personal career money from company capital.
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: Missing founder cash, exact platform take rates, CAC, refund loss, warranty reserve, private valuation, or live net worth is not filled unless a reliable source is present.

sources.title: South China Morning Post Dong Mingzhu profile
